title: Industrial and Consumer Chemicals (Management and Control) (Companies Registered to Deal with Chemicals) Notice, 2023
title_en: Industrial and Consumer Chemicals (Management and Control) (Companies Registered to Deal with Chemicals) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Industrial and Consumer Chemicals (Management and Control) (Companies Registered to Deal with Chemicals) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Companies registered to deal with chemicals
provisions.content: The general public is informed that companies listed in the Schedule to this Notice are registered to deal with chemicals.

provisions.title: Validity
provisions.content: The validity of registration to deal with chemicals shall be— (a) in the case of companies with full registration, five years; and (b) in the case of companies with provisional registration, two years.
